ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-09-2002. JUN-07-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STATEMENT RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY DEFENDANT REVEALNET, INC.
